_metadata.description: Verified external links database for SEO-optimized article generation. Each link includes anchor text suggestions, authority signals, topical relevance, and contextual usage guidance.

schema.domain: Root domain for deduplication and domain-diversity checks
schema.title: Real page title (fetched and verified)
schema.description: What the page provides — used by the AI writer to decide relevance
schema.anchorTextSuggestions: 2-4 natural anchor text options ranked by SEO value (descriptive > branded > naked URL)
schema.linkType: official | government | editorial | tool | review | aggregator | booking | directory
schema.authority: high | medium | low — based on domain type, DA, and trust signals
schema.trustSignals: Why this source is credible (array of reasons)
schema.relevantAirports: Which airports this link is relevant for (array, or ['all'])
schema.relevantTopics: Which article topics should consider using this link
schema.relevantArticleTypes: Which article types (hub, sub-pillar, spoke) benefit most
schema.rel: dofollow | nofollow | sponsored — link relationship attribute
schema.contextualUsage: When and how to use this link in articles — guidance for the AI writer
schema.pageType: landing-page | guide | tool | interactive | blog-post | directory | booking
schema.lastVerified: ISO date when URL was last confirmed active

links.title: JFK Airport Parking
links.description: Official JFK parking page with real-time availability, garage locations, rates, cell phone lot info, and pre-booking options.
links.contextualUsage: Use when citing official on-airport parking rates, garage names, or pre-booking options. Ideal for hub articles and any pricing discussion. Anchor to specific rate claims.

links.title: JFK AirTrain
links.description: Official AirTrain page with fares, station map, connections to subway and LIRR, and real-time service status.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing AirTrain fares, the cost advantage of off-site parking (eliminating AirTrain cost), or inter-terminal transfers. Critical for cost-comparison articles.

links.title: JFK Security Wait Times
links.description: Real-time and estimated TSA security wait times by terminal at JFK, including PreCheck lane availability.
links.contextualUsage: Use when advising travelers on how early to arrive. Pair with arrival recommendations and parking shuttle timing.

links.title: JFK Connecting Flights
links.description: Guide to connecting between terminals at JFK including AirTrain transfers, customs requirements, and minimum connection times.
links.contextualUsage: Use in articles discussing terminal-to-terminal travel, minimum connection times, or customs re-screening requirements.

links.title: JFK Terminal Map
links.description: Interactive terminal map showing all JFK terminals, AirTrain stations, parking garages, and ground transportation options.
links.contextualUsage: Link when referencing terminal locations, parking garage proximity to terminals, or AirTrain station locations. Especially useful in hub and navigation-focused articles.

links.title: JFK Taxi, Car & Van Service
links.description: Official taxi and car service information for JFK including flat-rate fares, pickup locations, and rideshare guidelines.
anchorTextSuggestions: JFK taxi and car service info
links.contextualUsage: Use when comparing parking costs vs taxi/rideshare costs, or when discussing the $70 flat rate to Manhattan.

links.title: JFK Airlines Directory
links.description: Complete list of airlines operating at JFK with terminal assignments and contact information.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing which airlines operate from which terminals, especially during 2026 terminal changes. Critical for parking-near-terminal articles.

links.title: Airlines | JFK Terminal 4
links.description: Complete airline list for JFK Terminal 4 with check-in locations and contact numbers. Terminal 4 is JFK's largest terminal.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing Terminal 4 specifically, Delta operations, or parking options near Terminal 4 (Blue Garage).

links.title: T4 Services | JFK Terminal 4
links.description: Terminal 4 amenities and services including lounges, dining, shopping, currency exchange, and pet relief areas.
links.contextualUsage: Use in articles about JFK amenities, lounges, or Terminal 4 specifically.

links.title: LaGuardia Airport Parking
links.description: Official LaGuardia parking page with garage rates, economy lot pricing, and pre-booking options.
links.contextualUsage: Use when citing official LaGuardia parking rates or comparing on-airport vs off-site options at LGA.

links.title: LaGuardia Public Transportation
links.description: Public transit options to LaGuardia including Q70-SBS LaGuardia Link, M60-SBS bus, and subway connections.
anchorTextSuggestions: how to get to LaGuardia by bus
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing alternatives to driving/parking at LaGuardia, or comparing transit costs vs parking costs.

links.title: LaGuardia Terminal Map
links.description: Interactive terminal map for LaGuardia showing Terminals A, B, and C with parking, ground transportation, and services.
links.contextualUsage: Link when discussing LaGuardia terminal locations or parking proximity.

links.title: LaGuardia Security Wait Times
links.description: Real-time TSA security wait times at LaGuardia by terminal.
links.contextualUsage: Use when advising LaGuardia travelers on arrival timing.

links.title: Security Screening | Transportation Security Administration
links.description: TSA's official security screening guidelines including prohibited items, liquids rules, and what to expect at checkpoints.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing security procedures, prohibited items, or how security affects arrival time planning. High-authority .gov link — excellent for E-E-A-T.

links.title: TSA PreCheck | Transportation Security Administration
links.description: TSA PreCheck enrollment information, benefits, participating airports, and application process.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing faster security options, arrival time recommendations, or traveler programs. Always pair with wait time data to show the benefit.

links.title: Global Entry | U.S. Customs and Border Protection
links.description: Global Entry program details including benefits, enrollment, interview scheduling, and eligibility requirements.
anchorTextSuggestions: the Global Entry trusted traveler program
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing international arrival procedures at JFK, customs wait times, or time-saving programs for frequent travelers.

links.title: Taxi Fare - TLC
links.description: NYC Taxi & Limousine Commission's official taxi fare structure including JFK flat rate ($70), metered rates, surcharges, and tipping guidelines.
links.contextualUsage: Use when citing the $70 JFK flat rate to Manhattan, comparing taxi costs vs parking costs, or discussing peak surcharges. High-authority citation for fare claims.

links.title: Aviation Data & Statistics | Federal Aviation Administration
links.description: FAA's aviation data hub with passenger statistics, airport operations data, delay statistics, and industry forecasts.
links.contextualUsage: Use when citing passenger volume numbers, airport rankings, or delay statistics. Excellent E-E-A-T signal for data-heavy articles.

links.title: BTS | Transtats Airports
links.description: Bureau of Transportation Statistics airport data portal with on-time performance, passenger counts, and carrier statistics by airport.
links.contextualUsage: Use when citing airport on-time performance, busiest routes, or carrier market share at specific airports.

links.title: How to get to JFK Airport on public transit
links.description: MTA's official guide to reaching JFK via subway (A, E, J/Z trains), LIRR, and AirTrain with step-by-step directions and fares.
anchorTextSuggestions: how to get to JFK by public transit
subway and LIRR connections to JFK
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing public transit alternatives to driving/parking. Pair with cost comparisons (AirTrain + subway = $11.40 vs parking at $10-30/day).

links.title: How to get to LaGuardia Airport on public transit
links.description: MTA's guide to reaching LaGuardia via Q70-SBS LaGuardia Link, M60-SBS bus, and subway connections.
anchorTextSuggestions: how to get to LGA by public transit
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing public transit to LaGuardia or comparing transit costs vs parking costs at LGA.

links.title: Fares and tolls
links.description: Current MTA fares for subway, bus, LIRR, Metro-North, and bridge/tunnel tolls. OMNY contactless payment information.
links.contextualUsage: Use when citing specific subway or LIRR fares in cost comparison articles.

links.title: CLEAR | Secure Identity at Airports, Stadiums, & More
links.description: CLEAR biometric identity verification service for expedited security screening. Enrollment, pricing, and airport availability.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing faster security options at JFK Terminal 4 (only terminal with CLEAR) or general travel tip articles.

links.title: JFK Airport Construction & Modernization: New Terminals
links.description: Port Authority's official JFK redevelopment page covering the $19B modernization including New Terminal One, Terminal 6, and roadway projects.
links.contextualUsage: Use in any article mentioning 2026 construction, terminal changes, or arrival time impacts. Critical for freshness and authority signals.

links.title: We Keep the Region Moving | Port Authority of New York and New Jersey
links.description: Port Authority homepage — the agency operating JFK, LaGuardia, Newark, bridges, tunnels, and the PATH train.
anchorTextSuggestions: the Port Authority of New York and New Jersey
the agency that operates JFK and LaGuardia
links.contextualUsage: Use when first mentioning the Port Authority in hub articles or when establishing credibility for airport-related claims.

links.title: JFK Airport Parking | SpotHero
links.description: SpotHero's JFK parking search with real-time availability, pricing, and booking for off-airport lots near JFK.
links.contextualUsage: Use as a comparison point when discussing where to book parking. Nofollow since it's a competitor/aggregator. Mention alongside Triply as one of several booking options.

links.title: JFK Parking Promo Code - Save $8 On JFK Airport Parking
links.description: Coupon codes and promo deals for JFK airport parking lots, including the JFK319 code for $8 off.
links.contextualUsage: Use in coupon/discount-focused articles. Cite specific codes like JFK319 ($8 off). Nofollow since it's a competitor aggregator.

links.title: JFK Airport Parking, Long Term Parking Rates from $7.99/Day
links.description: JFK parking comparison site with rates, shuttle information, and booking for multiple off-airport lots.
links.contextualUsage: Use sparingly as a secondary source for rate comparisons. Nofollow. Prefer Triply links for booking CTAs.

links.title: John F Kennedy Parking Coupon & Promo Code | Save $5 at JFK
links.description: On Air Parking's coupon page for JFK with the JFKOFF code ($5 off) and other current promotions.
links.contextualUsage: Use in comprehensive coupon roundup articles. Cite the JFKOFF code specifically. Nofollow.

links.title: ParkSleepFly Packages With Hotels, Parking & Shuttles
links.description: Park-sleep-fly hotel packages combining overnight hotel stay with extended airport parking and shuttle service.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing park-sleep-fly packages as an alternative to standard parking. Mention the $43-49/night typical price range. Nofollow since it's a booking competitor.

links.title: JFK International Airport Lounges | Priority Pass
links.description: Priority Pass guide to JFK lounges including HelloSky (T4), Bobby Van's Steakhouse (T8), Be Relax Spa (T5), and Air India Maharaja Lounge (T4).
anchorTextSuggestions: JFK lounge access with Priority Pass
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing JFK lounge options, especially the $28 Bobby Van's credit and Priority Pass-eligible lounges in T4.

links.title: A Guide to JFK Lounges: What to Know - NerdWallet
links.description: Comprehensive guide to all JFK lounges by terminal including airline lounges, Priority Pass options, and day-pass availability.
anchorTextSuggestions: a comprehensive guide to JFK lounges
links.contextualUsage: Use as an authoritative editorial source when discussing lounges. Good for E-E-A-T — citing well-known publications strengthens content credibility.

links.title: A Comprehensive Guide to John F. Kennedy International Airport (JFK) | Chase
links.description: Chase's comprehensive JFK airport guide covering terminals, transportation, dining, lounges, and travel tips.
links.contextualUsage: Use as an authoritative third-party guide reference. Chase.com has extremely high domain authority — linking to it signals content quality. Ideal for hub articles.

links.title: John F. Kennedy (JFK) Airport Guide | Upgraded Points
links.description: Detailed JFK airport guide with terminal breakdowns, lounge reviews, transportation options, and travel tips from the points/miles community.
links.contextualUsage: Use as a supporting editorial reference for terminal information or lounge reviews. Good topical authority signal.

links.title: Complete Guide to JFK Airport | Blacklane
links.description: Blacklane's comprehensive JFK guide covering terminals, transportation, dining, and ground transportation options.
links.contextualUsage: Use as a supplementary editorial source. Good for domain diversity when you already link to Chase and NerdWallet.

links.title: JFK John F Kennedy Intl Airport - FlightAware
links.description: Real-time flight tracking at JFK including arrivals, departures, delays, weather conditions, and airport activity.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing flight delays, weather disruptions, or advising travelers to check flight status before heading to the airport. Practical tool link that adds value.

links.title: LGA LaGuardia Airport - FlightAware
links.description: Real-time flight tracking at LaGuardia including arrivals, departures, delays, and airport conditions.
links.contextualUsage: Use in LaGuardia articles when discussing delays or advising travelers to check flight status.

links.title: Find Cheap Flights Worldwide & Book Your Ticket - Google Flights
links.description: Google's flight search tool for comparing airfares, tracking prices, and exploring destinations.
links.contextualUsage: Use when suggesting travelers book flights or check prices. Very high authority link — use sparingly and naturally.

links.title: Luggage Storage JFK Airport, from $2.99
links.description: Off-site luggage storage options near JFK starting at $2.99/day with $1,300 guarantee per item.
links.contextualUsage: Use in articles about JFK amenities or luggage storage. Compare with on-airport Smarte Carte ($25/day) to show savings. Nofollow since it's a booking service.

links.title: Smarte Carte JFK – Baggage Storage, Porter, Meet & Greet
links.description: Official on-airport luggage storage provider at JFK with services in Terminals 1 and 4, plus porter and meet-and-greet services.
anchorTextSuggestions: Smarte Carte luggage storage at JFK
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing on-airport luggage storage options. Cite the $25/day rate and T1/T4 availability.

links.title: JFK Airport - Terminal 5 | New York, NY | EV Station
links.description: EV charging station details at JFK Terminal 5 Yellow Parking Level 2 with 5 dual-plug ChargePoint stations (10 plugs total).
links.contextualUsage: Use in EV-focused articles or when mentioning that JFK has limited EV charging (only T5 currently). Practical tool link for EV drivers.

links.title: Find & Use EV Chargers with the ChargePoint App
links.description: ChargePoint's driver portal for finding and using EV charging stations. Required for JFK Terminal 5 chargers.
anchorTextSuggestions: the ChargePoint app for EV drivers
links.contextualUsage: Use when mentioning that JFK's T5 chargers require a ChargePoint RFID card. Practical value for EV drivers.

links.title: JFK Long Term Parking Lot 9 - Jamaica, NY | Yelp
links.description: Yelp reviews for JFK's economy Lot 9 with traveler ratings, photos, and experience reports.
links.contextualUsage: Use when citing traveler experiences at Lot 9 or when adding social proof about parking quality. Nofollow per Yelp's guidelines for review links.

links.title: JFK Discount Parking Reviews | Trustpilot
links.description: Trustpilot reviews for JFK Discount Parking with customer ratings and verified purchase experiences.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing parking lot quality or helping travelers evaluate options. Nofollow for review platform links.

links.title: Car Rental at New York John F Kennedy Airport from $24/day - KAYAK
links.description: Kayak's car rental comparison for JFK with prices from major rental companies and airport pickup locations.
anchorTextSuggestions: compare rental car prices at JFK
JFK car rental deals on Kayak
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing rental cars as an alternative to parking, especially for one-way trips. Link in articles about Federal Circle or ground transportation. Nofollow since it's a booking aggregator.

links.title: Driving directions, live traffic & road conditions updates - Waze
links.description: Real-time traffic map with construction alerts, road closures, and community-reported incidents.
links.contextualUsage: Use when advising travelers to check traffic before driving to the airport, especially during 2026 JFK construction. Practical tool that adds real value.

links.title: Lactation Room Locator App | Mamava
links.description: App to find and unlock Mamava lactation pods at airports, hospitals, and other locations. JFK has 11 Mamava pods across all terminals.
anchorTextSuggestions: the Mamava app for nursing parents
links.contextualUsage: Use in family-focused articles or when mentioning JFK's 11 Mamava pods. Practical download link for traveling parents.

links.title: SeatGuru - Travel News & Information
links.description: Airline seat maps, reviews, and flight amenity information to help travelers choose the best seats.
links.contextualUsage: Use sparingly in general travel tip articles when discussing flight preparation alongside parking planning.

links.title: BLADE Helicopter - JFK to Manhattan
links.description: BLADE helicopter service between JFK and Manhattan heliports. 5-minute flight, from $195 per seat.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing premium transportation options or time-saving alternatives for JFK travelers. Interesting/unique option that adds depth to ground transportation articles.

links.title: Uber at JFK Airport
links.description: Uber's JFK pickup/dropoff guide with designated locations, estimated fares, and surge pricing information.
links.contextualUsage: Use when comparing parking costs vs rideshare costs, or when discussing pickup/dropoff logistics at JFK.

links.title: Lyft at JFK Airport
links.description: Lyft's JFK pickup/dropoff information with designated areas and estimated pricing.
links.contextualUsage: Use alongside Uber link when discussing rideshare options for domain diversity.

links.title: LaGuardia Terminal A
links.description: Terminal A information including Spirit, Frontier, and Southwest Airlines operations, gate maps, dining, and services.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing Terminal A operations (Spirit, Frontier, Southwest) or LGA terminal-specific parking.

links.title: LaGuardia Terminal B
links.description: Terminal B information for American Airlines, United Airlines, Air Canada, and Southwest operations at LaGuardia's newest terminal.
anchorTextSuggestions: the new Terminal B at LGA
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing Terminal B, the LGA redevelopment, or parking near Terminal B (pedestrian bridge to garage).

links.title: LaGuardia Terminal C
links.description: Terminal C information for Delta Air Lines operations, Delta Sky Club lounge, and terminal amenities.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing Delta operations at LGA or Terminal C parking options.

links.title: LaGuardia Taxi, Car & Van Service
links.description: Official taxi and car service information for LaGuardia including metered fares, pickup locations, and rideshare guidelines.
anchorTextSuggestions: LGA taxi and car service info
links.contextualUsage: Use when comparing LGA parking costs vs taxi/rideshare costs.

links.title: LaGuardia Bus Service
links.description: Bus routes serving LaGuardia including Q70-SBS LaGuardia Link, M60-SBS, Q48, and Q72 with schedules and stops.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing public transit alternatives to driving/parking at LaGuardia.

links.title: LaGuardia Airlines Directory
links.description: Complete list of airlines operating at LaGuardia with terminal assignments.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing which airlines operate from which LGA terminals.

links.title: LaGuardia Connecting Flights
links.description: Guide to connecting between terminals at LaGuardia.
links.contextualUsage: Use in articles discussing terminal transfers at LaGuardia.

links.title: LaGuardia Car Rentals
links.description: Rental car companies at LaGuardia with pickup locations and shuttle information.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing rental car alternatives to parking at LGA.

links.title: LaGuardia Hotel Shuttles
links.description: Hotel shuttle services at LaGuardia with pickup locations and participating hotels.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing park-sleep-fly or hotel shuttle options at LaGuardia.

links.title: LaGuardia Airport Transformation: A World-Class Experience
links.description: Port Authority's official LaGuardia redevelopment page covering the $8B terminal modernization and airside improvements.
links.contextualUsage: Use in any LGA article mentioning the terminal transformation or construction impacts on parking/traffic.

links.title: LaGuardia Airport (LGA) Parking | SpotHero
links.description: SpotHero's LaGuardia parking search with real-time availability, pricing, and booking for off-airport lots.
links.contextualUsage: Use as a comparison point when discussing LGA parking booking options. Nofollow since it's a competitor.

links.title: LGA Parking Promo Code - Save $7 On LaGuardia Parking
links.description: Coupon codes and promo deals for LaGuardia airport parking lots.
links.contextualUsage: Use in LGA coupon/discount-focused articles. Nofollow since it's a competitor aggregator.

links.title: LaGuardia Airport Guide - NerdWallet
links.description: NerdWallet's guide to LaGuardia Airport covering terminals, transportation, dining, and travel tips.
links.contextualUsage: Use as an authoritative editorial source for LGA articles. Good E-E-A-T signal from a high-DA publication.

links.title: LaGuardia (LGA) Airport Guide | Upgraded Points
links.description: Detailed LaGuardia airport guide with terminal breakdowns, lounge info, and transportation options.
links.contextualUsage: Use as a supporting editorial reference for LGA terminal information.

links.title: Car Rental at New York LaGuardia Airport from $27/day - KAYAK
links.description: Kayak's car rental comparison for LaGuardia with prices from major rental companies.
anchorTextSuggestions: compare rental car prices at LGA
LGA car rental deals on Kayak
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing rental cars as an alternative to parking at LaGuardia. Nofollow since it's a booking aggregator.

links.title: Lyft at LaGuardia Airport
links.description: Lyft's LaGuardia pickup/dropoff information with designated areas and estimated pricing.
links.contextualUsage: Use when discussing rideshare alternatives to parking at LaGuardia.

_brokenLinks._description: URLs that were verified as broken on last audit. Kept here for reference so they are not accidentally re-added.

_usageGuidelines.domainDiversity: Never link to the same domain more than twice in one article. Aim for 4+ unique domains per article.
_usageGuidelines.authorityMix: At least 50% of external links should be 'high' authority. Include at least one .gov link per hub article.
anchorTextRules: Never use 'click here' or 'read more' as anchor text
Use descriptive anchors that tell readers what they'll find (e.g., 'JFK's official parking page' not 'the website')
Vary anchor text — don't repeat the same anchor for different links
Include the target keyword in 1-2 anchor texts per article maximum
Keep anchors under 8 words when possible
placementRules: Place external links within body paragraphs, not in isolation
Front-load high-authority links in the first half of the article
Don't cluster multiple external links in the same paragraph
Balance external links with internal links (aim for 2:1 internal-to-external ratio)
Never place external links in CTAs — CTAs link to Triply only

relAttributes.dofollow: For official sources, government sites, editorial content, and tools that add genuine value
relAttributes.nofollow: For competitor aggregators (SpotHero, Way.com), booking platforms, review sites (Yelp, Trustpilot), and coupon sites
relAttributes.sponsored: For any paid/affiliate links (none currently in this database)

_usageGuidelines.freshness: Re-verify all URLs monthly. Check .gov links quarterly (they restructure frequently). Mark broken links immediately and find replacements.
